title: NN17 5JE, Clearwater DC 2001 Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/FB3708UK/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Clearwater DC 2001 Limited   Installation name: Clearwater DC 2001 Ltd   Permit number: EPR/FB3708UK/V002   "
